---
title: "Yannik Behr"
about:
    template: trestles
    links:
        - icon: linkedin
          text: LinkedIn
          url: https://www.linkedin.com/in/yannikbehr/
        - icon: github
          text: Github
          url: https://github.com/yannikbehr
        - text: "Email"
          url: mailto:website@yannikbehr.com
        - text: "ORCID 0000-0003-3131-0864"
          url: https://orcid.org/0000-0002-6047-5396
        - text: "Google Scholar"
          url: https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=M2vUY_EAAAAJ&hl=en
        - text: "CV"
          url: "cv.pdf"
image: img/Yannik_mugshot_small.png
comments: false
---

<script type='application/ld+json'>
 {"@context":"http://www.schema.org","@type":"person","name":"Yannik Behr","jobTitle":"Senior Data Science Specialist","description":"Yannik Behr is a geophysicist and data scientist working on geohazard monitoring and decision tools using AI/machine learning and physics based models.","url":"https://yannikbehr.com","image":"https://yannikbehr.com/img/Yannik_mugshot_small.png","address":{"@type":"PostalAddress","addressLocality":"Taupo","addressRegion":"Waikato","postalCode":"3384","addressCountry":"New Zealand"},"alumniOf":[{"@type":"CollegeOrUniversity","name":"ETH Zurich","sameAs":"https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/ETH_Zurich"},{"@type":"CollegeOrUniversity","name":"Victoria University of Wellington","sameAs":"https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Victoria_University_of_Wellington"}, {"@type":"CollegeOrUniversity","name":"LMU Munich","sameAs":"https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Ludwig_Maximilian_University_of_Munich"}],"worksFor":[{"@type":"Organization","name":"GNS Science"}]}</script>
</script>


I'm a geophysicist working on natural hazards — mostly volcanoes and earthquakes. My job is turning messy geophysical data into probabilistic answers to practical questions: How likely is an eruption? What's happening beneath the surface? I combine physics-based models with statistical and machine learning methods, and I care a lot about the last mile — getting results out of research code and into tools, dashboards, and monitoring systems that people actually use to make decisions.
